title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var style=document.createElement('style');style.innerHTML='/* 全屏动态背景 */ #universal-bg{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;z-index:-1;background:linear-gradient(300deg,#ff5f6d,#ffc371,#23a6d5,#23d5ab);background-size:400% 400%;animation:flow 12s ease infinite} @keyframes flow{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}} /* 清除默认背景 */ html,body{background:none!important;width:100%;overflow-x:hidden} /* 侧边栏样式 */ #my-sidebar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:100%;width:260px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);z-index:99999;border-right:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);box-shadow:2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform 0.3s} /* 文章区域样式调整 */ .markdown-body,.FileList{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95)!important;border-radius:10px;padding:30px!important;box-shadow:0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);margin-bottom:20px!important} /* 隐藏默认头尾 */ .Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important} /* 搜索框 */ #search-box{width:100%;padding:10px;border:2px solid #eee;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:15px;outline:none;background:#f9f9f9} #search-box:focus{border-color:#ff5f6d;background:#fff} /* 导航链接 */ .nav-group{font-weight:bold;margin:15px 0 5px;color:#333;font-size:15px;border-bottom:2px solid #ffc371;padding-bottom:5px} .nav-item{display:block;padding:8px;color:#555;text-decoration:none;border-radius:5px;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:2px} .nav-item:hover{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff5f6d,#ffc371);color:white} /* 电脑端布局 */ @media(min-width:1000px){.markdown-body,.FileList{margin-left:290px!important;width:calc(100% - 320px)!important;max-width:1000px!important}} /* 手机端布局 */ @media(max-width:999px){#my-sidebar{transform:translateX(-100%)} #my-sidebar.active{transform:translateX(0)} #menu-toggle{display:block!important}} #menu-toggle{display:none;position:fixed;left:15px;bottom:15px;width:50px;height:50px;background:#ff5f6d;color:white;border-radius:50%;text-align:center;line-height:50px;font-size:24px;z-index:100000;box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);cursor:pointer}';document.head.appendChild(style);/* 插入背景 */ var bg=document.createElement('div');bg.id='universal-bg';document.body.appendChild(bg);/* 插入菜单按钮 */ var btn=document.createElement('div');btn.id='menu-toggle';btn.innerHTML='☰';btn.onclick=function(){document.getElementById('my-sidebar').classList.toggle('active')};document.body.appendChild(btn);/* 插入图片灯箱 */ window.ViewImage&&ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');/* 获取数据生成目录 */ fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var sb=document.createElement('div');sb.id='my-sidebar';var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.id='search-box';inp.placeholder='🔍 搜索文章...';inp.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();sb.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};sb.appendChild(inp);var title=document.createElement('h3');title.innerText=document.title;title.style.margin='0 0 15px 0';sb.appendChild(title);var map={};Object.values(d).forEach(p=>{var l=p.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!map[l])map[l]=[];map[l].push(p)});Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='nav-group';t.innerText=k;sb.appendChild(t);map[k].forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='nav-item';a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;sb.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(sb)}).catch(e=>console.log(e))});</script>
